releaseNotes:
• New: Multi-view audio focus — the app now requests OS audio focus when multi-view is open. Background music and podcast apps are properly interrupted. Incoming calls, Siri, and alarms mute all cells automatically and restore volume when the interruption ends.
• Fix: Stream-scanner green highlight now appears in every view (all channels, livestreams, movies, history) — not just while the search box is active. Validated channels also show a green check badge in the multi-view channel picker.
